news.headline: Dow drops 150 points, ISM Manufacturing PMI exceeds estimates. Dow at 44,759.96, NASDAQ at 19,416.22, S&P 500 at 6,047.97.
news.summary: During Monday's trading session, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance with the Dow Jones index dropping by approximately 150 points to 44,759.96, down 0.34%. In contrast, the NASDAQ rose by 1.03% to 19,416.22, while the S&P 500 saw a 0.26% increase to reach 6,047.97. Communication services sector experienced a 1% surge, whereas utilities shares declined by 1.9%. The ISM manufacturing PMI for November climbed to 48.4 from the previous month's 46.5, surpassing the market's 47.7 forecast. Senti Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNTI) observed a significant 540% increase, reaching $13.79 following a private investment announcement. NovoCure Limited also saw positive movement in trading.

news.headline: Robert Klein takes over as CEO of Voltalia, leading the company's operations and strategies.
Auction for All Silver & Gold Bank Bags Collection by One of a Kind Coins LLC ends tonight at 8 PM EST on G8Auctions.
news.summary: In Rochelle Park, New Jersey on December 2, 2024, coin enthusiasts and collectors have a limited time left to bid on the All Bank Bags Collection by One of a Kind Coins LLC. The auction, hosted on G8Auctions, is ending today at 8 PM EST. This highly anticipated event is set to close, so interested buyers should act fast to secure their piece of history.

news.headline: MYRIAD's public beta launch for on-chain prediction markets by Decrypt and Rug Radio is approaching. Register at myriad.markets now!
news.summary: Decrypt and Rug Radio are enhancing their integrated media platform by introducing on-chain prediction markets through MYRIAD. The public beta phase of this new feature will be available soon, with interested users encouraged to sign up at myriad.markets for early access.

news.headline: Cathay Innovation launches C.Lab to advise corporations on open transformation in AI era. Based in San Francisco.
news.summary: A newly established strategic advisory division based in San Francisco is facilitating partnerships between international businesses and innovative startups and technology firms, primarily from Silicon Valley and other key tech centers worldwide. The venture capital company Cathay Innovation disclosed this development on December 2, 2024, aiming to connect companies with the latest trends in technology and create mutually beneficial collaborations.

news.headline: Madison Metals acquires 100% interest in 13,990.90-hectare antimony-gold project; Antimony price tripled in past year.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Madison Metals Inc. announced its expansion in the critical minerals sector by securing binding letters of intent with three entities to attain full ownership of a significant antimony-gold project. Covering 13,990.90 hectares through 697 claims, the Howells Lake Antimony Gold Project in Ontario, Canada marks a strategic move for Madison given the rising value of antimony, which has tripled in price over the last year. The project presents one of the few remaining antimony historic resources globally, solidifying Madison's position in this lucrative sector. Madison operates under the ticker symbols CSE: GREN, OTCQB: MMTLF, and FSE: 4EF0.

news.headline: CEO of Natural Gas Services Group to speak at NobleCon20 investor conference in Dec 2024. Based in Midland, Texas, NGS is a leader in natural gas compression equipment and services. (Word count: 24)
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, on December 2, 2024, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: NGS), a prominent supplier of natural gas compression equipment and services in the energy sector, revealed its involvement in an upcoming investor conference scheduled for December 2024.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls after Trump threat; Intel CEO exits & Apple enters. Tesla rises on self-driving.
news.summary: Following a threat from Donald Trump, the Dow Jones experienced a decline, while the CEO of Intel stepped down as Apple gained entry. On the other hand, Tesla saw an increase in its stock value due to a strategic move towards self-driving technology. This resulted in a fluctuation in the stock market with the Dow Jones dipping amidst these developments. The post discussing these market updates, including live coverage, originated from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: DataRobot named to Fortune Future 50 list at #24 for its AI innovations and global impact.
news.summary: DataRobot, a leading AI provider focused on driving business success, has recently been honored with a spot on Fortune's 2024 Future 50 list. This prestigious list highlights companies with significant market potential and the ability to effectively capitalize on it. DataRobot secured the 24th position on the list, showcasing its commitment to innovation and its role in assisting global organizations in leveraging AI. CEO Debanjan Saha emphasized DataRobot's dedication to enhancing businesses through AI solutions.

news.headline: MYRIAD launching in public beta this week integrates prediction markets and Quests with written/video content.
news.summary: Launching this week in public beta, MYRIAD combines on-chain prediction markets and Quests with written and video content.

news.headline: Mark Zytko appointed Chair of LuskinOIC Foundation Board in 2024, Foundation raises funds for orthopaedic care for children.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the LuskinOIC Foundation has appointed Mark Zytko as the new Chair of the Board starting in 2024. This foundation, overseen by President Michael Sullivan, collects funds for LuskinOIC, an organization that offers specialized orthopedic treatment to children irrespective of their socio-economic background or insurance coverage. Mark Zytko, who is currently a co-founder and senior advisor at Mesa West Capital, will utilize his vast expertise in investment management in this new position. Zytko played a pivotal role at Mesa West and will now bring his knowledge to lead the foundation towards its mission.

news.headline: EQT AB appoints Nomination Committee for 2025 AGM based on 31 Aug 2024 ownership structure, includes Jacob Wallenberg.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 2, 2024, EQT AB announced the formation of its Nomination Committee for the Annual Shareholders' Meeting 2025. The committee was selected based on the ownership structure as of August 31, 2024. Jacob Wallenberg will serve as the Chairperson, representing Investor AB. The committee will play a crucial role in key decisions affecting the company's direction, with a focus on shareholder interests.

news.headline: ASML expects China to account for 20% of their total net sales by FY25
New cross-chain crypto gaming hub & wallet launched by Portal after successful gaming token release.
news.summary: A prominent gaming platform recently unveiled its wallet and game discovery platform following a highly successful token launch. This launch is regarded as one of the largest in the gaming industry this year, generating significant attention and participation. Users can now access the platform's wallet for storing and managing their tokens, as well as utilize the game discovery platform to explore various gaming options. The release of these features marks a significant milestone for the platform, with a high level of interest and engagement from the gaming community.

news.headline: Navy Federal awarded 3 ROTC All-American Program scholarships to top Air Force, Army, and Navy/Marine students.
news.summary: In Vienna, Virginia, Navy Federal has announced the selection of three ROTC All-American Scholarship Program Students of the Year. The students chosen represent the top performers from the Air Force, Army, and Navy/Marine branches. This recognition highlights their exceptional dedication and achievement within the program.

news.headline: Banxico announces official exchange rate of 20.4357 USD/MXN
Banijay Group: Weekly shares trading activities reported an increase of $10 million.
Sequoia Financial Group plans Western expansion with $21.5 billion AUM post partnership completion.
news.summary: In Akron, Ohio, on Dec. 2, 2024, Sequoia Financial Group, LLC (Sequoia Financial) announced the completion of a partnership with Eide Bailly LLP, a leading national accounting firm. Sequoia Financial, an SEC-registered wealth manager, currently manages $21.5 billion in assets as of Sept. 30, 2024. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both firms as they aim to expand their range of financial services.

news.headline: Global thin film and printed battery market to reach $904.94M by 2031, driven by 5G and wearables' demand. Molex LLC, Varta AG, and Renata SA lead.
news.summary: The thin film and printed battery market is poised for rapid growth on a global scale, with forecasts pointing towards a substantial increase to $904.94 million by 2031. This significant advancement is primarily fueled by the widespread adoption of 5G technology, increasing popularity of wearable devices, and a growing emphasis on sustainability. The developments are particularly noteworthy in regions like New York.

news.headline: Enron teases comeback on 23rd anniversary of bankruptcy. Social media skeptical, warns of possible crypto scam.
news.summary: Enron, a former energy company involved in one of the largest accounting scandals in U.S. history, is being teased for a potential comeback on the 23rd anniversary of its bankruptcy. A social media account under the name @enron posted a video declaring "We're back. Can we talk?" The post has been tagged with a warning that it could be a crypto scam. The video emphasizes the need for change in today's world and features AI-created images, people claiming "I am Enron," and the company's logo. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SHIB price drops 9% despite burn rate surging 295%. SHIB at $0.00002889, market cap $17B. Dogecoin at $0.4177, $61.4B cap.
news.summary: Despite a promising burn rate and increasing transaction volumes, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has experienced a 9% decrease in price. Currently priced at $0.00002889, its market cap stands at $17 billion. In the past 24 hours, it has decreased by 9.5%, but over the last 7 days, it has seen a positive trend of +13.2%.Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.4177 with a market cap of $61.4 billion. It has seen a 3.2% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 3.2% increase over the past week.Another cryptocurrency, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), is currently priced at $0.00001993 with a market cap of $8.4 billion. It has experienced a significant drop of 10.9% in the last 24 hours, although there has been a recovery of 4.3% in the past week.InvestingHaven predicts that SHIB could potentially rise to $0.0000444 by mid-December. This forecast suggests that a retracement in its price may create a bullish setup for 2025 if this level is maintained. For additional details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: How inflation affects consumer spending.
Record attendance boosts AMC, Cinemark shares after ‘MoGlicked’ weekend.
Retail workers in the U.S. are considering leaving jobs due to safety concerns; over 40% may leave in 12 months - study.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by the Loss Prevention Research revealed that over 40% of retail employees in the United States are considering leaving their current positions within the next year due to safety reasons. The research, based on responses from workers across the country, highlights a significant concern for personal safety among retail staff. The survey findings bring attention to the pressing issue of workplace safety for the retail sector.

news.headline: Fitness International partners with Feeding America to raise $150,000 for 9.6 million meals by 2024 through events at Club Studio & nationwide LA Fitness locations.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on December 2, 2024, Fitness International, LLC, the company behind LA Fitness and Club Studio, has announced a collaboration with Feeding America with the goal of providing assistance to families through fitness initiatives. The partnership aims to gather $150,000 in funding to supply a minimum of 9.6 million meals by the conclusion of 2024. This effort is part of a broader strategy to support communities in need and address food insecurity nationwide.

news.headline: Infobip sees 3.4bn interactions, 26% rise from last year, on Black Friday as customers prefer conversational experiences.
news.summary: In Vodnjan, Croatia, new data from Infobip reveals that customers gravitate towards conversational experiences, particularly through rich channels like RCS, on Black Friday. This year, Infobip witnessed a surge in total customer interactions on its platform, reaching 3.4 billion on Black Friday, marking a notable 26% rise from the previous year. Among these interactions, 1.8 billion were classified as messages.

news.headline: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) to attend UBS Global Technology and AI Conference on Dec 4.
news.summary: In Purchase, New York, Mastercard (NYSE: MA) disclosed its involvement in the UBS Global Technology and AI Conference scheduled for Wednesday, December 4.

news.headline: Transpara's new FDA clearance for breast cancer detection at RSNA includes advanced capabilities like breast density assessment and temporal comparison to enhance radiologist performance.
news.summary: ScreenPoint Medical is set to unveil its latest FDA cleared features at the upcoming event in Chicago on December 2, 2024. The company's groundbreaking capabilities include breast density assessment and temporal comparison tools aimed at enhancing radiologist performance. This latest clearance marks a significant advancement for ScreenPoint Medical, showcasing its commitment to innovation in the medical technology field.

news.headline: FINBOA Inc. reports a 46% year-over-year increase in growth driven by direct sales and distribution partners.
news.summary: FINBOA Inc., a prominent player in intelligent process automation for regulatory compliance in financial institutions, announced a noteworthy 46% year-on-year growth in client base. This growth is attributed to the effective utilization of direct sales and distribution partners. The company's expansion efforts have proven successful, as evidenced by the significant increase in their clientele. The news was disclosed in Houston on December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Biocodex to present 7 studies at AES 2024 Annual Meeting on Dec 6-10 in Los Angeles. Global pharma company specializes in treating rare pediatric diseases.
news.summary: Biocodex, a leading pharmaceutical company specializing in rare pediatric disease treatment, is set to showcase seven research studies at the AES 2024 Annual Meeting in Los Angeles, California, from December 6-10. The studies will center on various important topics in the field.

news.headline: US Data Center Colocation Market valued at $12.4 billion in 2023 to reach $26.95 billion by 2029 with a 13.81% CAGR. Major new vendors contributing to growth - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the U.S. Data Center Colocation Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2023, the market was valued at USD 12.40 billion and is predicted to hit USD 26.95 billion by 2029, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.81%. The market is set for substantial expansion, fueled by the swift digitalization of businesses and increased investments from colocation and cloud services.

news.headline: CW to premiere "Best Christmas Movies Ever!" on Dec 9 at 8 PM. GalaxyCon partners for a doc discussing favorite holiday films.
news.summary: GalaxyCon has introduced its new production arm, Galaxie Productions, to collaborate on a groundbreaking documentary spotlighting the top Christmas movies ever made. The film will bring together a mix of creators, critics, and stars who will delve into their cherished holiday films. Renowned writer and director Mark A. Altman will lead the project with Altman also serving as the executive producer. The documentary is set to feature exclusive insights and discussions from various industry perspectives on these timeless festive classics. This venture aims to captivate audiences with a unique and comprehensive look at the most beloved Christmas movies in cinematic history.

news.headline: Pet supplements market projected to reach $4.68 billion by 2031 as per Meticulous Research® report.
news.summary: In Redding, California, on December 2, 2024, a recent market research report was released focusing on the Pet Supplements Market. The report covers important aspects such as market size, share, forecast, and trends analysis based on different factors including type, form, source, pet type, and function. The types of pet supplements considered in the report include Probiotics & Prebiotics and Antioxidants while the forms mainly consist of Pills/Tablets. The analysis also delves into the sources of these supplements, with a focus on pet types such as Dog and Cat, and functions like Hip & Joint health and Weight management.

news.headline: Samuel L. Jackson, Kimberly Williams-Paisley, and Diedrich Bader support Alzheimer's Association in fundraising campaign "Generation Hope." - CHICAGO, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In support of the Alzheimer's Association during this holiday season, celebrities Samuel L. Jackson, Kimberly Williams-Paisley, and Diedrich Bader are sharing personal stories of how Alzheimer's has affected their loved ones. The campaign aims to raise awareness and encourage donations to the cause. The initiative comes as part of a larger effort to support the organization in its mission to provide assistance and research for the 6.2 million Americans currently living with Alzheimer's and their families. The awareness drive seeks to engage the public in helping combat the impact of this disease, emphasizing the importance of supporting those affected.

news.headline: Simon reports 6.4% increase in portfolio traffic on Black Friday, with a 7.1% gain at Simon's Malls nationwide.
news.summary: Initial findings show that there was a significant increase in foot traffic at Simon's Malls, Premium Outlets, and Mills centers during the initial holiday shopping weekend of the year. The data, gathered on Dec. 2, 2024, revealed a notable surge in visitors to these shopping destinations. Simon, a prominent real estate investment trust that specializes in owning top-tier shopping and dining establishments, observed a strong turnout with numerous shoppers visiting these locations.

news.headline: Samara Strycker named CFO of International Motors; Takes position from Do Young (DY) Kim as EVP.
news.summary: In LISLE, Illinois on December 2, 2024, International Motors, LLC disclosed that Samara Strycker has assumed the role of executive vice president and CFO. This appointment comes after the departure of Do Young (DY) Kim, who previously held the position.

news.headline: Latin America Data Center Colocation Market to reach $1.81 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 8.33% driven by tax incentives and 5G edge deployments.
news.summary: A report on the Latin America Data Center Colocation Market has been released, indicating a market value of USD 1.12 billion in 2023. The market is expected to grow to USD 1.81 billion by 2029, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.33%. Governments in various Latin American countries have introduced incentives to encourage data center investments, supporting the market's expansion.

news.headline: Mullen Group Ltd acquires Pacific Northwest Investments Inc & subsidiary PNW on Dec 1, 2024 (TSX: MTL).
news.summary: On December 1, 2024, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) completed the acquisition of Pacific Northwest Investments Inc. and its subsidiary, Pacific Northwest Moving (Yukon) Limited ("PNW"). A share purchase agreement was finalized for the acquisition. Mullen Group expressed satisfaction with this move.

news.headline: Cineverse secures film favorites Breathing In and Deus Irae from XYZ Films for SCREAMBOX streaming, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: Two acclaimed movies are set to be available for streaming on SCREAMBOX, a platform based in Los Angeles. Cineverse, a leading entertainment studio listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CNVS, and its horror division Bloody Disgusting, have revealed the procurement of these two films. The movies were acquired from XYZ.

news.headline: KGTV ABC 10News in San Diego wins National Press Foundation Award for reporting on dementia care in the U.S.
news.summary: San Diego's KGTV ABC 10News, a station owned by The E.W. Scripps Company, received the 2024 AARP Award for Excellence in Journalism on Aging for its comprehensive reporting on dementia care in the U.S. The award was given by the National Press Foundation. The recognition was a result of a yearlong series by the station, showcasing important insights into the challenges and advancements in dementia care.

news.headline: Carlsberg's shares surge as Kremlin cedes control of its Russia unit. #Stocks #Investing
Tatu City in Kenya appointed as Regional Office for World Free Zones Organization, recognizing its leadership in SEZs.
news.summary: In Nairobi, Kenya on December 2, 2024, Tatu City, the country's inaugural mixed-use Special Economic Zone (SEZ), has been designated as the Regional Office and National Contact Point for the World Free Zones Organization. This appointment underscores Tatu City SEZ's prominent role in promoting SEZ development.

news.headline: Enron, infamous for its collapse 20 years ago, makes a comeback with a crypto twist focusing on "permissionless innovation."
news.summary: More than 20 years after its infamous downfall, Enron is making a comeback by focusing on promoting innovation without the need for permission.

news.headline: Coinbase cancels Turkey expansion post submission of pre-application to government, within three months.
news.summary: The decision to revoke the approval occurred a mere 90 days following the submission of the preliminary application by the American cryptocurrency exchange to the Turkish authorities.

news.headline: TSA releases 2025 Canine Calendar, honoring over 1,000 explosive detection dogs. Download now! #TSA #CanineCalendar
news.summary: Today, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) in Washington, DC, announced the launch of the 2025 TSA Canine Calendar. This yearly tradition highlights the contributions of over 1,000 explosives detection dogs working throughout the country.

news.headline: Gateway Fiber secures $75M in debt financing, totaling $250M this year. Funds to expand fiber network in MO, MN, MA.
news.summary: Gateway Fiber, a prominent fiber internet provider based in Wright City, Missouri, has recently secured an additional $75 million in debt financing. This funding will support the ongoing expansion of Gateway's fiber network in Missouri, Minnesota, and Massachusetts until 2025. In total, Gateway has raised $250 million in debt financing this year. Texas Capital is serving as the Administrative Agent and Texas Capital Securities as the Lead Arranger for this financing initiative.

news.headline: JPMorgan declines transition financing, according to Bloomberg.
California Forward partners with UC Possibility Lab to boost economic resources for communities; focus on community and worker benefits agreements.
news.summary: California Forward (CA FWD) has partnered with the Possibility Lab at UC Berkeley to boost economic development resources in California. The collaboration focuses on aiding regions and communities in negotiating with project developers for community and worker benefits. It involves assessing successful models, establishing a database of best practices, and developing Community Benefits and Workforce Agreements between community groups, government, and developers. The initiative aims to enhance regions' capacity to access funding for clean energy, regenerative agriculture, and economic development. Kate Gordon, CEO of CA FWD, highlights the shared resources and capacity-building opportunities this project will provide.

news.headline: Mark Lamberti promotes synodal approach in corporate leadership at Catholic conference; 600+ leaders attend ALC in Johannesburg.
news.summary: More than 600 church leaders convened at Holy Family College in Johannesburg for the third annual Archdiocesan Leadership Conference. The event, organized by the Archdiocese of Johannesburg, witnessed a turnout of over 600 attendees. The conference featured prominent speakers and discussions on various topics related to church leadership.

news.headline: CPA firm BeachFleischman PLLC gains Indiva Advisors LLP, expanding into Las Vegas, NV with a national cannabis practice.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona on December 2, 2024, BeachFleischman PLLC revealed that Indiva Advisors LLP has become a part of their firm since November 1, 2024. This strategic move sees BeachFleischman expanding into the lucrative Las Vegas, Nevada market by incorporating Indiva, whose renowned national practice offers tailored accounting services.
